text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep things running smoothly!
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our community events!
Welcome, @mentor_lina! We're thrilled to have you as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members!
Hey @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! You're all set as a member. Feel free to jump in and say hello!
